hero.title: Éclat de Lune
hero.subtitle: Valmorel la belle - The ultimate family ski resort.

intro.title: A charming village opening onto the Grand Domaine
intro.text: Nestled at the foot of the imposing Cheval Noir mountain, Valmorel captivates with its unique charm, a blend of authenticity and modernity. A truly integrated, human-scaled resort, it is built around a fully pedestrianized main street and offers a multitude of services year-round.

destination.title: The Grand Domaine
destination.description: The Grand Domaine de Valmorel winds its way from 2,400 to 1,350 meters in altitude, through splendid forests, gentle alpine slopes, and dizzying peaks. With 165 km of trails, 4 freeride zones, and numerous beginner slopes, the area is perfect for the entire family.

type1.title: Cosy Atmosphere
type1.description: Nothing compares to the warmth of a crackling fireplace, where faces glow with emotion and laughter fills the air.

type2.title: Comfort & Design
type2.description: Masterful architecture that opens up to the sumptuous panorama of the surrounding peaks.

item1.title: High-End Amenities
item1.desc: Modern infrastructures perfectly adapted to comfort requirements.

item2.title: Ideal Location
item2.desc: At the gateway to the Tarentaise, just two hours from Lyon and one hour from Chambéry.

item3.title: Masterful Architecture
item3.desc: A village-resort with perfectly integrated architecture.

artDeVivre.title: Incredible Variety
artDeVivre.description: Already voted the best family resort in the world, Valmorel has also been awarded the national Famille Plus label. Acclaimed for the majesty of its landscapes, it offers an astonishing array of activities throughout the year.

item4.title: Connected gym & À la carte concierge

fiscalite.title: Investment
fiscalite.description: An ideal promotion for investment. The data, photographs, or visuals contained in this document are provided for information purposes.

contact.subtitle: Contact & Launch
contact.title: The mv-residences Valmorel Team
contact.description: Our team is at your disposal to accompany you in your investment project in Valmorel.
